sections.content: Looking at the image, the player (W-centered green box) is now inside the left charcoal box! The player moved DOWN and is now overlapping with the charcoal box. Let me check the exact state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Green boxes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        child_colors = [next((x for x in seg['nodes'] if x['id'] == cid), None)['color'] for cid in n['children']]
        print(f"id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']} child_colors={child_colors}")

print("\n=== Charcoal nodes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] < 50:
        print(f"id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# ASCII check
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== ASCII left panel ===")
for i in range(30, 38):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][10:25]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
